title: Compatibility Matrix Release Gate
description: A release-and-rollout control workflow that manages promotion waves, rollback readiness, and deployment dependencies across environments. Focus case: compatibility matrix release gate.
assumptions: Environments, components, and deployment groups are pre-enumerated and provided as initial facts.
Actions represent discrete, atomic operations (manual or automated) in the delivery pipeline.
Approval policies and validation suites capture required constraints to decide promotion deterministically.
risks: Complex dependency graphs or missing initial facts can create deadlocks that block promotion.
Insufficient test coverage or flaky validation suites may lead to false positives/negatives in the gate.
Policy misconfiguration (e.g., contradictory approvals) can prevent finalization of the release state.
